feed.title: BrandGhost
feed.subtitle: Reduce time and effort in growing your content creator business.

entry.title: AI and the Future of Content Creation - What Every Marketer Needs to Know

link.title: AI and the Future of Content Creation - What Every Marketer Needs to Know

entry.summary: Explore how AI is shaking up content creation and social media in 2025. Learn practical ways to use AI for ideation, writing, design, and scheduling—and see how BrandGhost empowers creators and marketers to work smarter.

entry.title: We Believe in the Power of AI, and the Power of People

link.title: We Believe in the Power of AI, and the Power of People

entry.summary: At BrandGhost, we just released our AI Philosophy, and it’s more than a statement, it’s a reflection of how we build, how we serve, and what we believe about the future of content creation.

entry.title: The New Rules of Authentic Storytelling for Creators in 2025

link.title: The New Rules of Authentic Storytelling for Creators in 2025

entry.summary: Discover why authenticity, relatability, and brand voice are the keys to standing out in 2025 -- and how creators can craft stories that truly resonate in a crowded social feed.

entry.title: AI Content Generation and the Rise of Virtual Influencers in 2025

link.title: AI Content Generation and the Rise of Virtual Influencers in 2025

entry.summary: Explore how AI is revolutionizing content creation and influencer marketing in 2025, from smarter workflows to the rise of virtual personalities. Learn how creators and brands can adapt and thrive in this new era.

entry.title: BrandGhost Now Supports Mastodon
entry.summary: At BrandGhost, our mission has always been to help you manage your brand’s presence across all the platforms that matter — and today, we’re excited to announce a major expansion - BrandGhost now supports Mastodon!
